issues.title: Damaged Road and Active Pothole
issues.description: Reported issue of category pothole located at Thendral Avenue, Basthi, Hosur, Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, 635109, India. Immediate inspection and remediation are requested.
issues.complaintLetter:
To,
The Executive Engineer,
Municipal Corporation Road Maintenance Dept,
Thendral Avenue, Basthi, Hosur, Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, 635109, India

Subject: Urgent Complaint Regarding Damaged Road and Active Pothole at Thendral Avenue, Basthi, Hosur, Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, 635109, India

Respected Sir/Madam,

I am writing to bring to your attention a pressing civic issue: "Damaged Road and Active Pothole" located near Thendral Avenue, Basthi, Hosur, Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, 635109, India. 

This issue represents a significant concern for residents in this area. Specifically, it has caused severe damage to vehicles and poses a major accident risk for two-wheelers.

We kindly request your department to inspect this site and arrange for the resolution of this issue on a priority basis. We estimate this should require approximately 5 days of standard repair work.

Thank you for your attention to this community matter.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Contact Details]
Date: [Date]
